title: Lower Grass Sides
description: This pack changes grass, path, crimson, warped, mycelium, and other blocks like that to have a lower side so it will look nicer.
body: The Lower Sides texture pack adds new textures for grass, crimson, path, mycelium, warped, podzol, etc so it looks lower than the usual texture. This pack is purely for aesthetic purpose.![Lower Sides](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/fbff5c8734098a8e0366a4f7bfd8166c8ebed93d_0.webp)
